achievements.title: A Healthy Beginning
achievements.description: Get the Life Capsule in the First Cave.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Ignoring Gun Control Laws
achievements.description: Steal the Polar Star.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Welcome to the Polar Express
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Polar Star.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Escaping the Scene of the Crime
achievements.description: Start a new game and make it out of the First Cave without taking any damage (start a new game to try again).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: A Locket of Hair from a Mimiga's Chest
achievements.description: Find the Silver Locket.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Farming for Hearts
achievements.description: Get the Life Capsule in the Yamashita Farm.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Digital Thomas Guide (Remember Those?)
achievements.description: Get the Map System.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Just Say No to Fighting
achievements.description: Say No to fighting Balrog in the shack.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: I Changed My Mind! I Don't Want to Fight!
achievements.description: Try to Escape the Fight with Balrog in the shack.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Ah! A Giant Killer Lunch Box!
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the shack.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Brave Little Toaster Who Could
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the shack without taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Pea Shooter
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the shack only using the Polar Star at Level 1.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Yeah? Waddaya Want?
achievements.description: Talk to the Little Man before you can put him in your pocket.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Cave's Key to the Rest of the Story
achievements.description: Dig out Arthur's Key.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Mushroom Kingdom
achievements.description: Starting from the door to the Graveyard get Arthur's Key without firing your gun or getting hit more than Once. Don't push the fire button, even in menus or scroll text. (Return to Mimiga Village to try again).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Kind of Like an Egg Hunt
achievements.description: Collect all the life capsules at the Egg Corridor.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Death Egg
achievements.description: Run Past Egg No. 7 from below (can be done from either side).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The True Easter Egg
achievements.description: Hatch the ID Card
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Torpedoes in Disguise
achievements.description: Get the Missile Launcher.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Blaster Master
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Missile Launcher.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Hard Boiled Egg
achievements.description: Reach the bottom of Egg No. 02.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Dr. Frankenstein's Assistant?
achievements.description: Defeat Igor in the Egg Corridor.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: What an Egghead
achievements.description: Defeat Igor in the Egg Corridor without taking any damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Cowboy Vs Mimiga
achievements.description: Defeat Igor in the Egg Corridor using only the Polar Star.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Where's that Draft Coming From?
achievements.description: Feel a cold wind blowing in at Egg No. 00 before it hatches.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: A Hard Egg to Crack
achievements.description: Starting from Egg No. 00, make it back to Arthur's House without taking any damage in the Egg Corridor during your first visit. (Go back to Egg No. 00 to try again).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: That's a Rough Stop
achievements.description: Found Santa's Key.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Santa Told Me It's Okay to Light Up!
achievements.description: Received the gift of the Fireball.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Pyromaniac
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Fireball.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Love Story
achievements.description: Snagged Chaco's Lipstick while she was sleeping to remember the night you had together.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: You're Just Jelly!
achievements.description: Milk out the Jellyfish Juice.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Santa Got me a Lump of Coal for Christmas
achievements.description: Find the Charcoal.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Need More Jelly!
achievements.description: Try to obtain more than one Jellyfish Juice.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Hubba Bubba Bubble Gun
achievements.description: Dig out the Bubbler.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Big League Chew
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Bubbler.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Hopefully You've Gotten Your Tetanus Shot
achievements.description: Received the Rusty Key.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Grasstown Lovers
achievements.description: Collect all of the life capsules in Grasstown.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Why Didn't You Ask If I Didn't Want to Fight This Time?
achievements.description: Try to Escape Balrog in the Power Room.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Robot Abuse
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the Power Room.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: What ARE You?!
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the Power Room without taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Quit Playing With your Balls
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the Power Room only using the Fireballs at level 1.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Can You Chew It?
achievements.description: Receive the Gum Key.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Cowardly Rob and Run
achievements.description: Escape the Rabid Mimiga from the Grasstown Hut without defeating it or [Quote] taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Playing Hide and Go Seek?
achievements.description: Fight off the Rabid Mimiga in the Grasstown.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Preparing for the Rabid Mimiga Apocalypse
achievements.description: Collect all missile upgrades at the Grasstown.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: To the Gallows
achievements.description: Reach the top left edge of the platform above the Execution Chamber.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Stepping into a Wad of Gum
achievements.description: Obtain the Gum Base.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Jurassic Park?
achievements.description: Defeat Balfrog.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Run! It's Godzilla!
achievements.description: Defeat Balfrog without taking any damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Gum Gum Rocket!
achievements.description: Defeat Balfrog by only damaging him using the Missiles Launcher; but you can attack everything else with any weapon however, wait until the missiles are completely off the screen. (Don't switch weapons until the missiles are completely off the screen).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: More Bang For Your Buck
achievements.description: Generate the Explosive.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Advanced Lawnmower Simulator
achievements.description: Starting from Gum, return back to Arthur's House without taking any damage. (Go back to Gum to try again).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Rabid Curly
achievements.description: Defeat Curly Brace.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Strong Independant Woman
achievements.description: Defeat Curly Brace without taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: A Horrible Flirt Attempt
achievements.description: Defeat Curly Brace only using your Polar Star.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Take Good Care of Machine Gun!
achievements.description: Trade for the Machine Gun.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Ultimate Flying Killing Machine
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Machine Gun.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Puppyback Ride
achievements.description: Carry a puppy.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Accidentally Wished for Bulma's Panties
achievements.description: Find Curly's Underwear.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: None of Your Business
achievements.description: Visit Ma Pignon early and say you have some business with him.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Where'd He Go?
achievements.description: Find the "Out" sign in the First Cave.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Crocodile Dundee
achievements.description: Kill all the outdoor Sandcroc in the Sand Zone.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Alpha and Omega Monster
achievements.description: Defeat Omega in the Sand Zone.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Oh, Mega Crapola!
achievements.description: Defeat Omega in the Sand Zone without taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Hate to Burst Your Bubble
achievements.description: Defeat Omega only firing the Bubbler, starting at level 1 and not allowing it to reach level 3 while firing it. (You may switch between weapons but don't fire them).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Buried Gems
achievements.description: Collect all the life capsules in the Sand Zone.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Too Many Puppies
achievements.description: Try to hold more than one puppy at a time. (Too bad it's not like the Switch Version).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: In the Dog House
achievements.description: Fall into the paw space at the bottom of the Sand Zone.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Who Stole My Heart?
achievements.description: Be given the Life Pot.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: I Don't Like Sand! It's Course and Rough and Irritating!
achievements.description: Starting from Jenka's House, reach the Sand Zone Storehouse without taking any damage. (Return to Jenka's to try again).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Dog Napper
achievements.description: Reach the Sand Zone Storehouse with a puppy still on your head.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Friendly Fire
achievements.description: Defeat Frenzied Toroko in the Sand Zone Storehouse.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Crummy Amazon Service
achievements.description: Defeat Frenzied Toroko without taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Say Hello to My Little Friend
achievements.description: Defeat Frenzied Toroko in the Sand Zone Storehouse only using the machine gun to cause damage at level 1. (Other weapons can be used to destroy the flowers).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Don't Cut Yourself
achievements.description: Take the Blade.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Armed and Dangerous
achievements.description: Have 5 Weapons at one time.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Avenge King
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Blade.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Hey! You've Got to Hide Your Love Away
achievements.description: Find the Life Capsule hidden in the labyrinth.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Escape Labyrinth in One Piece
achievements.description: Unlock the door and escape Labyrinth I without taking damage, falling too far, or hitting the bottom before reaching the computer. (Reset to title screen to reset).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: "We Just Need More Power!"
achievements.description: Be given the Turbocharge.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: There's a Snake in My Boot!
achievements.description: Generate the Snake.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: You Slippery Little Rattlesnake!
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Snake.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Break a Leg!
achievements.description: Find the Arms Barrier before getting either version of the booster.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Key to the Doctor's Hidden Stash
achievements.description: Be Given the Clinic Key.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Pill Popper
achievements.description: Reach the Cure-All.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Balrog? Is that You?
achievements.description: Defeat Puu Black in the Clinic Ruins.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: My Puu is Black?
achievements.description: Defeat Puu Black in the Clinic Ruins without taking any damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Ninja Balrog
achievements.description: Defeat Puu Black in the Clinic Ruins only using the Blade at level 1 to damage him. (Other weapons may be used as long as they don't cause damage to Puu Black).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: What a Catastrophe!
achievements.description: Defeat Monster X in the Labyrinth.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: That Cat Had 9 Lives, Just Burnt Them All
achievements.description: Defeat Monster X in the Labyrinth only using the Fireball. (Firing with any other weapon will lock you out of this achievement).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Knockoff Bargin Brand Booster
achievements.description: Receive the Booster v0.8.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Now Just Missing a Barrier for the Legs
achievements.description: Find the Arms Barrier.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Another Blast from the Past
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the Boulder Chamber.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Over My Dead Body!
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the Boulder Chamber without taking any damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Snakes?! I Hate Snakes!
achievements.description: Defeat Balrog in the Boulder Chamber only using the Snake, starting at level 1. You can level it up during the battle.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: My Missiles Just Went Super Saiyan
achievements.description: Power up your missiles at the Boulder Chamber.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Blaster Master Electric Boogaloo
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Missile Launcher.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: She's Going to Fight My Battles for Me
achievements.description: Start from the Boulder Chamber entrance and make it through Labyrinth M to the Dark Place without firing your weapon (Don't push the fire button even in menus). Do not take the teleporter.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: In Zelda a Rope is Actually a Snake
achievements.description: Take the Tow Rope.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Core of the Problem
achievements.description: Defeat the Core at the Core of the Island.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Core Is Colder than I Imagined It Would Be
achievements.description: Defeat the Core by only using the Polar Star at any level. (Switching to another weapon will lock you out of this achievement. You must start the battle with the Polar Star).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: No Strings Attached
achievements.description: Pick up the Tow Rope after defeating the Core.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Why not Mouth to Mouth?
achievements.description: Be given Curly's Air Tank.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: I Thought I was Rescuing Her!
achievements.description: Curly's life Functions have ceased...
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: She Wet the Bed...
achievements.description: Save Curly from drowning.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Cleansed My Main Artery
achievements.description: Reach the Main Artery (Ironhead) at full health.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Go Fish!
achievements.description: Defeat Ironhead.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: A Hint in Your Hand
achievements.description: Discover the clever hint while in the Main Artery.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Invasion of Our Privacy
achievements.description: Earn the Alien Medal.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Getting Your Booster Shots
achievements.description: Receive the Booster v2.0.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Spur of the Moment
achievements.description: Upgrade to the Spur. Well done!
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Returning to the Scene of the Crime
achievements.description: Enter the First Cave, get the Spur, and escape without taking damage while only using the Polar Star and the Spur.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Mr. Fixit
achievements.description: Use both teleporters in the Labyrinth in a single session.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Seeing Stars
achievements.description: Receive the Whimsical Stars
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: If She Gives You an Inch, Take the Whole Mile
achievements.description: Receive another Life Pot from Jenka.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Killer Yolk
achievements.description: Collect all of the missile upgrades from the "Egg Corridor?".
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: See Ya! Don't Wanna Beat Ya!
achievements.description: Get the Missile Upgrade and escape the "Egg Observation Room?" without fighting the Sisters.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: It's Almost Time For Dragon Tales
achievements.description: Defeat the Sisters.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Kind of Reminds Me Of My Sisters
achievements.description: Defeat the Sisters without taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Sister Act
achievements.description: Defeat the Sisters by remaining on the square with the missiles and without jumping. (Make sure to be at the center of the chest).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Don't Count Your Chickens Before They Hatch
achievements.description: Reach the very end of the row at the bottom of both Egg 11 and Egg 10 in the "Egg Corridor?" (The measure indicator will appear when you reach the spot).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Don't Quote Me
achievements.description: Experience the Bad Ending.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Chess, Anyone?
achievements.description: Uncover the Nikumaru Counter.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: A Peaceful Night
achievements.description: Make it from the bottom of the Outer Wall to the Storehouse without firing your gun. (Don't push the fire button at all even in menus).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: A Very Fishy Key
achievements.description: Pull out the Teleporter Room Key.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Rushed Exposition
achievements.description: Suddenly receive Sue's Letter.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Too Early?! You've Got to Be Kidding Me!
achievements.description: Reach the door to the Last Cave before the rocket is built in the Plantation.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Final Missing Link
achievements.description: Successfully use the broken teleporter in the Grasstown.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: PokeMan
achievements.description: Put the Little Man in your pocket.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: You Can't Catch Me, I'm the Gingerbread Shroom!
achievements.description: Receive the Mushroom Badge.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Go Ask Alice
achievements.description: Defeat Ma Pignon.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Tripping on Shrooms
achievements.description: Defeat Ma Pignon without taking any damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Taking You Back to the Mushroom Kingdom
achievements.description: Defeat Ma Pignon only using the Spur at level 1. (Don't charge your weapon).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Homemade Shrooms
achievements.description: Cook the Ma Pignon.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Friends Forever!
achievements.description: Received the Iron Bond.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Why Does Everyone Think I'm Ash Ketchum?
achievements.description: Take the Little Man back home to his wife and son.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: You Kind of Got Conned
achievements.description: Trade for the Nemesis.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Rubber Ducky, You're the One
achievements.description: Max out the experience points for the Nemesis.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Nemesis Climb
achievements.description: Climb the Outer Wall using the booster only 3 times, starting from the Little's house and reaching the Storehouse holding only the Nemesis and keeping it at level 1. (Go into the Little's House to reset).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Master of Disguise
achievements.description: Put on the Mimiga Mask.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: They Just Don't Make Them Like They Used To
achievements.description: Take the Broken Sprinkler.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Going Straight Onto Ebay!
achievements.description: Take the Sprinkler.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Is that the Latest Steam Deck?
achievements.description: Get the Controller.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: I'm Sorry
achievements.description: Talk to Professor Booster while wearing the Mimiga mask.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Transfermers...More than Meets the Eye
achievements.description: Get trapped under the rocket Momorin Sakamoto had created, and then escape.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Are They Planting Life Capsules Too?
achievements.description: Collect all of the Life Capsule at the Plantation.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Better Late Than Never
achievements.description: Get the Life Pot at the Plantation.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Black Wind of Dread
achievements.description: Reach the hidden Last Cave.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Jolly Red Giant
achievements.description: Defeat the Red Ogre.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Shrek's Cousin
achievements.description: Defeat the Red Ogre without taking any damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Walking in Arthur's Footsteps
achievements.description: Earn the Clay Figure Medal.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Item Hoarder
achievements.description: Hold 24 Items at one time!
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: I Can't Believe it! Fresh Air!!!
achievements.description: Make it to the Balcony from the hidden Last Cave. Congrats, you've escaped the cave!
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: I'm Done with This Game!
achievements.description: "You were never seen again." (Last seen on the Balcony).
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Whoops, I Forgot I was Still Wearing This
achievements.description: Pass the Final Cave while still wearing Mimiga mask.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: That's All, Folks
achievements.description: Read the sign hidden at the Balcony.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Misery Loves Company
achievements.description: Defeat Misery at the Throne Room.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Mastered Misery's Miserable Mystical Day
achievements.description: Defeat Misery without taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: It's Time For Your Examination
achievements.description: Defeat the Doctor at the King's Table.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: And Now the Drugs Are Kicking In
achievements.description: Defeat the Rabid Doctor at the King's Table.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Pseudo Science
achievements.description: Defeat the Doctor and the Rabid Doctor at the King's Table without taking damage.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Prison Story: Love Is in the Air
achievements.description: Make hearts appear at the King's Table.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Go Back to Whence You Came!
achievements.description: Destroy the Undead Core!
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Total Annihilation
achievements.description: Defeat Misery, Sue and the Undead Core.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Get to the Choppa!
achievements.description: Experience the "Normal" Ending.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Hail Arthur! Our True Hero
achievements.description: Reach the "Normal" Ending while still wearing the Mimiga Mask.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Black Wind of Death
achievements.description: Discovered the Sacred Ground. Good Luck!
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: At Least They're Being Honest
achievements.description: Read the awful hidden sign in the Sacred Ground.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Oh! So That's Where I Dropped It!
achievements.description: Get the Life Capsule in the Sacred Ground.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Quote Has a Big Heart
achievements.description: Reach the max possible health count.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Sacred Missile Set
achievements.description: Get the missile upgrade at the Sacred Ground.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: The Holy Missile Launcher
achievements.description: Get the Missile Launcher packed with 100 missiles at the Sacred Ground
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Fully Loaded
achievements.description: Collect all of the missile upgrades in the game, including the Super Missile Launcher.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Would You Like Your Laundry Heavy Pressed?
achievements.description: Defeat the Heavy Press and make it into "Passage?".
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Who is the Doctor
achievements.description: Discover the Doctor's real name.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: He Doesn't Look Too Bad
achievements.description: Defeat Ballos's first phase.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Now I Understand Why They Call Him Ballos
achievements.description: Defeat Ballos's second phase.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Eye See What You're Up To
achievements.description: Defeat Ballos's third phase.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: What a Ride! Thanks for Playing!
achievements.description: Defeat Ballos's final phase.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Dedication!
achievements.description: Defeat Ballos while having your trusty Polar Star in your inventory.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Is That a Little Man in Your Pocket?
achievements.description: Defeat Ballos with the Little Man still in your pocket.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: A Weapon in Each Hand
achievements.description: Defeat Ballos while having only two weapons in your inventory.
achievements.author: MajinWamu

achievements.title: Mega Man Style
achievements.description: Beat the game by defeating Ballos in one session without healing from the heal computers or beds unless you're required. You must save a new game at the Start Point before you get the Polar Star or heart upgrade. Do not reset to menu. (Dying is okay).
achievements.author: MajinWamu
